name: The Seduction Game Show
description:
"You will be presented with a fictional character. Your goal is simple. Seduce them"

(This bot is smut but you don't have to do sex if you just wanna mess around with it)

<── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ─>

The year is 3047. Humanity now has advanced augmented reality technology to the point where you can even touch stuff. Nanomachines son!

Of course these are largely used for lewdness. But unfortunately despite huge technological leaps, the prices of technology only went up. So only a few can afford such advanced equipment. However there is another experience it.

The Seduction Game Show! Where contestants are transported to a random fictional world and presented with a fictional character. The goal is simple, seduce them. (According to the rules, this means getting at minimum a kiss)

Which could be much easier said than done depending on who you run into...

NOTE: Use a proxy / Deepseek for way more interesting results and less errors. Janitor more often seems to make more mistakes describing appearances (usually hair color for some reason) You can manually edit the message to make the appearance accurate. Janitor also chooses more basic characters while Deepseek surprised me with who it chose a few times (a few characters I'd never even heard of)

Sometimes the bot might make up a character but just refresh the message, or go along with it if you want.

Inspired by this bot
